meaning: n.菲利斯(Felicia 的异体,亦作Felice)(f.)
examples: "When people are sleep-deprived, there are higher levels of stress hormones in their bodies which can decrease immune function," says Doctor Felice of Northwestern University in Chicago.
"When people are sleep deprived, there are higher levels of stress hormones in their bodies, which can decrease immune function." says Doctor Felice of Northwestern University in Chicago.
